title: Imatinib binding to ABL kinase (1IEP, DFG-out, 50 ns)

C1.note: 1IEP fetched (2.1 A), chain A extracted, ACE/NME caps for disordered termini, propka3 pH 7.0 HIS tautomers, imatinib (STI) built from crystal HETATM with GAFF2/AM1-BCC (parmchk2 0 missing params). tLEaP succeeded attempt 2 (Errors=0) after NME methyl-name fix; 48 Na+/40 Cl- neutralize+150 mM; prmtop built. Density 1.0285 g/cc, vol 483452 A^3 sane. PROCESS_REPORT steps all PASS.

C2.note: PLAN.md FF table justifies each choice via tier protocol: ff19SB (PMID:40476389 + Amber24 p.34), OPC (manual p.34 ff19SB-matched), Li/Merz-OPC ions (p.56), GAFF2/AM1-BCC ligand (p.33 + skill); all manual-validated for existence. Box pad 12 A and 50 ns (user-specified) justified with reasoning + caveats. No banned hardcoded-default phrases. RAG-consulted, pubmed Step 2b done, PLAN APPROVED gate present before sbatch.

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/burst/equil2/prod all PASS. prod.mdout reaches NSTEP=25,000,000 (50 ns), TEMP 310.03 K (sigma 1.36), density 1.0285 g/cc, Etot -164304 kcal/mol stable, no NaN. check_convergence: backbone/DFG/ligand/A-loop drifts all <0.5 A. 233.7 ns/day, ~5.2 h.

C4.note: Analysis targets each objective: DFG backbone RMSD + Phe382 chi1 + Asp381 psi + Phe382-Thr315 packing dist (DFG-out stability); cpptraj hbond donormask/acceptormask for hinge (pyridine-N1 vs Met318, aminopyrimidine vs Thr315) with occupancies; A-loop backbone RMSD + per-res RMSF; Lys271-Glu286 salt bridge. 19 .dat files present with real data (verified dist_pyN_met318 mean 3.087 A over 1000 frames; hbond_l2p Thr92/Glu63 entries genuine). Correct methods and observables for the prompt.

C5.note: Paper (Schindler et al. Science 2000, PMID:10988075) confirms STI-571 binds the inactive Abl conformation with unphosphorylated activation loop in a distinct inactive state. Answer key: DFG-out maintained; H-bonds to Met318 (hinge), Glu286, Asp381; A-loop stays inactive. Agent results match all: DFG RMSD 1.13 A stable (no flip); pyridine-N1...Met318 NH 96.4% occ at 3.07 A; amide-NH...Glu286 ~85% combined; amide-O1...Asp381 68.5% + piperazine...Asp381; A-loop RMSD plateaus 3.19 A with rigid DFG anchor (inactive, no transition). All three key partners captured at high occupancy.
